nodes.name: Life
nodes.description: Cellular life organized into Bacteria, Archaea, and Eukarya.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Bacteria
nodes.description: Prokaryotic domain containing diverse bacterial lineages.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Archaea
nodes.description: Prokaryotic domain with many extremophiles and close evolutionary ties to eukaryotes.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Eukarya
nodes.description: Domain containing organisms with nuclei and membrane-bound organelles.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Proteobacteria
nodes.description: Large bacterial phylum including many model organisms and pathogens.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Firmicutes/Bacillota
nodes.description: Gram-positive lineage including Bacillus, Clostridia, and lactic acid bacteria.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Actinobacteria/Actinomycetota
nodes.description: High-GC Gram-positive bacteria including Streptomyces and Mycobacterium.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Cyanobacteria
nodes.description: Photosynthetic bacteria central to oxygenic photosynthesis.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Bacteroidetes/Bacteroidota
nodes.description: Diverse bacteria common in soils, oceans, and animal microbiomes.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Spirochaetes/Spirochaetota
nodes.description: Helical bacteria including free-living and pathogenic forms.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Deinococcus-Thermus
nodes.description: Bacteria known for radiation resistance and thermophily.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Planctomycetes
nodes.description: Bacteria with unusual cell biology and aquatic/soil diversity.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Chlamydiae/Chlamydiota
nodes.description: Mostly intracellular bacterial lineage.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Acidobacteria/Acidobacteriota
nodes.description: Abundant soil bacterial lineage.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Verrucomicrobia/Verrucomicrobiota
nodes.description: Environmental and host-associated bacterial lineage.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Aquificota
nodes.description: Deep-branching thermophilic bacterial lineage.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

nodes.name: Thermotogota
nodes.description: Thermophilic anaerobic bacterial lineage.
nodes.sourceNote: Broad taxonomy scaffold curated from common biology textbook and public taxonomy concepts.

meta.title: Whole of Life
meta.description: A biology-first pilot map of Life, domains, major clades, representative organisms, and selected process biology links.
sourceNotes: OpenStax Biology 2e and comparable textbook taxonomy concepts
NCBI Taxonomy Browser broad lineage concepts
Curated for navigation and visualization; not yet an authoritative taxonomy import
